1:# Minute Hour Day Month Weekday  Command
2:0 * * * *  /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash -lc 'cd ~/BotA && [ -f .env ] && export $(grep -v ^# .env | xargs) || true; ~/BotA/tools/heartbeat_wrapper.sh hourly >> ~/BotA/logs/statusd.log 2>&1'
